title: European markets need to get their act together, CEO of Norway’s $2 trillion wealth fund says. ‘The winner takes it all’
summary_full: Nicolai Tangen, CEO of Norges Bank Investment Management, warned Europe is facing a crisis and that “it is time to act.”
